message:
chore: bump version to 0.2.7

Patch release bundling two CI-red fixes:

- fix(security): repo config can no longer override sensitive paths
  (playbookPath/diaryDir) via the expanded-default code path
  (2bc1e8b)
- fix(llm,doctor): align error-message contents with test contracts
  for getApiKey/llmWithFallback/runSelfTest (ce3334a)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "cass-memory",
-  "version": "0.2.6",
+  "version": "0.2.7",
   "type": "module",
   "description": "Universal memory system for AI coding agents - implements ACE framework",
   "author": "Jeffrey Emanuel",
